parameters: The magical device has been destroyed by Ange.
This cave bears scars of an ancient battle to the death between a
The mage first took down the dragon. He wreathed himself in icy
armor and rained ice magic down upon his enemy.
All that remains now are the magical organisms the mage created.
Their numbers have declined, but there are still some left. If you
see one, evacuate immediately and wait for backup.

None of these books are of any use.
You've heard of a monster called a raid skeano, right? The soldiers
in Tolkia use them like guard dogs.
When you defeat them, they sometimes drop weird sticks.
You should find one and take a look for yourself.
